case_title: ROGER WILLIAM PETERS VS. RYBENSKY REVOCABLE TRUST C/O CYNTHIA B. SHINAZY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,505.00 FILED BY PETERS, ROGER WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT RYBENSKY REVOCABLE TRUST C/O CYNTHIA B. SHINAZY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-13-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-13-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ROGER WILLIAM PETERS IS PRESENT. WITNESS FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS TIM FINAN. . DEFENDANT RYBENSKY REVOCABLE TRUST C/O CYNTHIA B SHINAZY IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-13-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PETERS, ROGER WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RYBENSKY REVOCABLE TRUST C/O CYNTHIA B. SHINAZY $6,505.00 PRINCIPAL, $144.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,649.00, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED MC-025 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE:$69.00 SERVED AUG-27-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RYBENSKY REVOCABLE TRUST C/O CYNTHIA B. SHINAZY
